sign-up.title: Sign up
sign-up.description: Create your account with email and password. Already have an account? <signIn>Sign in here</signIn>.

password.min: Password must be at least 6 characters

messages.error: Failed to create account. Please try again.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Choose a provider or continue with your email and password. If you don't have account <signUp>sign up here</signUp>.

email.title: Email login
email.description: Use the credentials tied to your workspace account.

messages.error: Failed to sign in. Please try again.

events.title: Events
events.description: Inspect ingested events, filter by schema, and open a rich detail view.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.subtitle: Keep it secret. Rotate and share only when needed.
apiKey.label: API key
apiKey.hint: Use this key for SDKs. Rotate before sharing.

inviteModal.title: Invite member
inviteModal.description: Send a workspace invite to a teammate.
inviteModal.help: Pending invites can be revoked anytime.

modal.title: Add role
modal.description: Create a role and preselect its permissions.

modules.title: Modules
modules.empty: No components yet. Add a visualization to start.
modules.emptyModule: No module found. Create one from the sidebar.

controls.reorderHint: Drag the cards to change the layout order.

drawer.subtitle: Choose a visualization, schema, and map inputs.

create.title: Create module
create.subtitle: Name and color for the new layout.
create.name: Name

schema.title: Schema builder
schema.subtitle: Design event schemas and share deep links to fields.

emptyState.noProject: Select a project to view its schemas.
emptyState.noPermission: You do not have permission to view schemas in this project.

validation.keyFormat: Key must start with a lowercase letter and contain only lowercase letters, digits, and underscores.
validation.keyTaken: A schema with this key already exists in this project.

editor.title: Schema builder
editor.subtitle: Define field types and constraints. Fields are immutable contracts so historical events stay valid.
editor.schemaKeyHint: Immutable identifier used in event payloads.
editor.enumInvalid: Only letters, numbers, dash, underscore, dot, and commas are allowed.
editor.numberHelp: Leave empty for no min/max limits.
editor.typeImmutableHint: Type is locked. Create a new field to use a different type.
editor.noFields: No fields yet. Click "Add field" to start building this schema.

hero.title: API Monitoring & Version Management
hero.description: A centralized platform to track performance, visualize usage, manage versions, and keep production systems stable.

features.title: Powerful Features for Modern API Management
features.description: Everything you need to monitor, analyze, and optimize your API performance in one place.

realTimeMonitoring.title: Real-time Monitoring
realTimeMonitoring.description: Track API performance, response times, and error rates in real-time with comprehensive dashboards.

advancedAnalytics.title: Advanced Analytics
advancedAnalytics.description: Gain insights with detailed analytics, custom reports, and intelligent alerting systems.

visualDashboards.title: Visual Dashboards
visualDashboards.description: Beautiful, customizable dashboards that make complex data easy to understand at a glance.

easyIntegration.title: Easy Integration
easyIntegration.description: Simple setup with comprehensive APIs and SDKs for seamless integration with your stack.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Get started in minutes and see immediate results with our intuitive platform.

step1.title: Connect Your APIs
step1.description: Integrate HotLog with your existing APIs using our simple SDK or webhook endpoints. No complex setup required.

step2.title: Monitor & Analyze
step2.description: Watch real-time performance metrics, error rates, and usage patterns with our comprehensive dashboard.

step3.title: Optimize & Scale
step3.description: Use insights to optimize performance, prevent issues, and scale your APIs confidently with data-driven decisions.

visualizations.title: Beautiful Visualizations
visualizations.description: Transform complex data into actionable insights with our comprehensive charting library.

stats.title: Trusted by Developers Worldwide
stats.description: Join thousands of developers who rely on HotLog for their API monitoring needs.

band.title: Start observing what matters
band.desc: See requests, spot errors, and ship fixes faster with confidence.

auth.INVALID_PASSWORD: Invalid password. Please check your password and try again.
auth.INVALID_EMAIL: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.INVALID_EMAIL_OR_PASSWORD: Invalid email or password. Please check your credentials.
auth.SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ALREADY_LINKED: This social account is already linked to another user.
auth.INVALID_TOKEN: Invalid authentication token. Please try again.
auth.ID_TOKEN_NOT_SUPPORTED: ID token authentication is not supported.
auth.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Please verify your email address before proceeding.
auth.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password is too short. Please choose a longer password.
auth.PASSWORD_TOO_LONG: Password is too long. Please choose a shorter password.
auth.USER_ALREADY_EXISTS: An account with this email already exists. Please use a different email or sign in.
auth.EMAIL_CAN_NOT_BE_UPDATED: Email address cannot be updated at this time.
auth.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.FAILED_TO_UNLINK_LAST_ACCOUNT: You cannot unlink your last account.
auth.USER_ALREADY_HAS_PASSWORD: User already has a password. Please provide the current password to proceed.
auth.SOMETHING_WENT_WRONG: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
